channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rappler Confirms President Marcos is in Good Health, Debunks Drug Use Claims
item.description: A viral video claiming that President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. was hospitalized in critical condition due to illegal drug use has been debunked by Rappler. The video, uploaded on May 5, gained significant...

item.title: Vancouver advocate returns mayoral honour over opposition to downtown overdose prevention site
item.description: Guy Felicella, a prominent harm reduction and recovery advocate in Vancouver, has announced he is returning an honour previously given to him by Mayor Ken Sim. Two years ago, Sim proclaimed May 29, 20...

item.title: Ted Turner, CNN Founder, Dies at 87 After Battling Dementia
item.description: Ted Turner, di famous American entrepreneur wey start di Cable News Network (CNN), don pass on at di age of 87. Di death come after im struggle with Lewy body dementia, wey na one progressive brain di...

item.title: Senate raises concern over minors accessing vapes through online platforms
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – During the Senate Health Committee’s second hearing on e-cigarettes and heated tobacco products on May 6, 2026, officials discussed how online shopping platforms are being used b...

item.title: Recap of Pakistan-India Tensions During Marka-i-Haq Conflict
item.description: The first week of May marks the first anniversary of the short but intense military conflict between Pakistan and India, known in Pakistan as 'Marka-i-Haq'. The crisis started after the Pahalgam attac...

item.title: Humboldt County Finds 596 Uncounted Ballots From November Election
item.description: Humboldt County election officials discovered 596 uncounted ballots from the November 2025 statewide special election in a locked drop box earlier this week. The ballots were overlooked due to a misco...

item.title: Oba Femi Links WWE Rise to Nigerian Roots and Athletic Background
item.description: Nigerian-born WWE star Isaac Odugbesan, wey people sabi as Oba Femi or “The Ruler,” don dey make serious waves for wrestling world. Him recent victory over Brock Lesnar for WrestleMania 42 don push am...

item.title: ITV moves Graham Norton’s The Neighbourhood to late evening slot following low ratings
item.description: Graham Norton's latest reality show, The Neighbourhood, has faced disappointing ratings since its launch, prompting ITV to shift the programme from its primetime slot to a later evening schedule. Init...

item.title: Nelson Mandela Bay Municipality Activates Joint Operations Centre During Heavy Rain and Flooding
item.description: The Nelson Mandela Bay Municipality has fully activated its Joint Operations Centre (JOC) in response to ongoing heavy rains and flooding affecting multiple areas of the metro. Disaster management tea...

item.title: Hantavirus Cases from MV Hondius Cruise Tracked Globally, Including Australia
item.description: A hantavirus outbreak originating on the MV Hondius, a Dutch-operated expedition cruise through South America, has caused at least three deaths and several serious illnesses. The virus, suspected to b...

item.title: Meta Upgrades Age Verification with AI After Children Bypass Checks Using Fake Mustaches
item.description: Meta is overhauling its age-verification system on Instagram and Facebook with a new AI-powered tool that analyzes images and videos for visual cues like height and bone structure to identify and remo...

item.title: MV Hondius passengers face isolation amid hantavirus outbreak at sea
item.description: Passengers aboard the MV Hondius, a Dutch-flagged cruise ship, have been stranded near Cape Verde due to a hantavirus outbreak. Since March 20, passengers have been confined to their cabins while medi...

item.title: Google Blocks Android Downgrades on Pixel 10 with New Anti-Rollback Update
item.description: Google’s May 2026 update for the Pixel 10 lineup introduces a stricter anti-rollback mechanism that prevents users from installing older versions of Android once the update is applied. This change aff...

item.title: Vancouver Implements Traffic and Security Measures Ahead of World Cup Matches
item.description: Vancouver is gearing up for the FIFA World Cup with several measures aimed at ensuring smooth operations and safety around BC Place stadium. A major portion of Pacific Boulevard, from the Cambie Stree...

item.title: Senate Approves Joseph Tegbe and Sola Enikanolaiye as Ministers
item.description: Naija people, the Nigerian Senate don give official nod to two new ministers. Joseph Olasunkanmi Tegbe don become Minister of Power, while Ambassador Sola Enikanolaiye don take up the role of Minister...

item.title: Draymond Green responds to Charles Barkley's critique with a pointed remark about his Rockets tenure
item.description: During a recent episode of 'Inside the NBA,' tension flared between Golden State Warriors forward Draymond Green and NBA Hall of Famer Charles Barkley. Barkley declared that the Warriors' era had ende...

item.title: Government proposes expanded EV charging network with minimal household costs
item.description: The Australian government is planning to broaden the country’s electric vehicle (EV) charging network, with households expected to contribute a small portion of the cost. This initiative comes as EV s...

item.title: NHL coaches and players weigh pros and cons of expanded replay reviews during playoffs
item.description: During the NHL playoffs, Carolina Hurricanes coach Rod Brind’Amour has suggested that expanded replay reviews could assist officials in making more accurate calls, particularly in the high-stakes envi...

item.title: NAB Warns Diesel Prices May Exceed $4 a Litre in Worst-Case Scenario
item.description: Australian diesel prices are at risk of reaching new highs above $4 a litre despite the Federal Government temporarily halving the fuel excise tax until the end of June. NAB has modelled a worst-case ...

item.title: Philippine national debt reaches P18.49 trillion amid peso depreciation
item.description: As of March 2026, the Philippines' total national debt has reached a record high of P18.49 trillion, according to the latest data from the Bureau of the Treasury. This surge is partly attributed to th...
